introSection: Port of Sky Treasure is a steel roller coaster built by Vekoma at at Sun World Da Nang Downtown.

sections.title: History
sections.content: From 2008 until 2009, it resided at Freestyle Music Park under the name Iron Horse. It sat dormant from when the park closed until 2014, when it was transported to its current location in Vietnam.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride's layout is very similar to the standard Vekoma mine train coaster, but a few turns are different on this ride. According to RCDB, it has a pirate theme.

fullText:
Port of Sky Treasure is a steel roller coaster built by Vekoma at at Sun World Da Nang Downtown.

From 2008 until 2009, it resided at Freestyle Music Park under the name Iron Horse. It sat dormant from when the park closed until 2014, when it was transported to its current location in Vietnam.

The ride's layout is very similar to the standard Vekoma mine train coaster, but a few turns are different on this ride. According to RCDB, it has a pirate theme.
